titles.title: Declaration of Independence Reaffirmation Act of 2026
Declaration of Independence Reaffirmation Act of 2026
A bill to reaffirm the Declaration of Independence as an Organic Law of the United States.

vote.text: Introduced in the Senate, read twice, considered, read the third time, and passed without amendment by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Message on Senate action sent to the House.

term.name: Rule of law and government transparency
Sovereignty, recognition, national governance and status

bill.summary:
Declaration of Independence Reaffirmation Act of 2026
This bill reaffirms and readopts the Declaration of Independence as an organic law of the United States and as the enduring charter of American independence, national sovereignty, natural rights, equal citizenship, and government by consent. (Organic laws are the laws that form the original foundation of a government.)
